description: Subdivision Review — reviews and processes preliminary and final plat applications, lot configurations, infrastructure dedications, and improvement agreements

hard_stops.label: Plat Not Sealed by Licensed Surveyor
hard_stops.logic: Subdivision plat does not bear the seal and signature of a licensed land surveyor — plat cannot be accepted

hard_stops.label: Infrastructure Improvement Agreement Not Executed
hard_stops.logic: Final plat submitted but the required infrastructure improvement agreement and surety have not been executed

hard_stops.label: Utility Capacity Insufficient
hard_stops.logic: Water, sewer, or electrical utility capacity is insufficient to serve the proposed number of lots — utility will-serve letters not obtained

soft_flags.label: Large Subdivision Threshold
soft_flags.logic: Subdivision exceeds 50 lots — may trigger traffic impact study and additional park land dedication requirements
